llm.note: auto | claude-code | anthropic-sdk | openai-compat. Auto picks the first available: claude CLI on PATH > ANTHROPIC_API_KEY > OPENAI_API_KEY > OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Override via AMATELIER_MODE env var.

openai_compat.note: Leave blank for defaults. OpenRouter: base_url=https://openrouter.ai/api/v1, api_key_env=OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Local Ollama: base_url=http://localhost:11434/v1, api_key_env=AMATELIER_LLM_API_KEY (any non-empty value).

runner.note: roundtable_runner.py — replaced Haiku Assistant. Deterministic mechanics, no LLM needed.

scoring.calibration: A score of 2 means genuinely good — not baseline. Most contributions should score 1. Reserve 2 for clearly above-average work. 3 is exceptional and rare. Average RT total should be 4-6, not 8+.
scoring.note: Each axis scored 0-3 (normal) or 10 (grand insight). No 4-9. Judge must quote the discontinuity message to award 10.

entry_fees.note: Flat fee per RT, not per-round. Deducted at RT start. V5: raised from 3/3/6/12 — agents were netting too easily.

penalties.note: Deducted from RT earnings. Floor is 0 gross — can't go negative from penalties alone. Operating fee still applies.

relegation.note: 3 consecutive net-negative RTs (gross - entry_fee < 0) triggers relegation choice. Agent decides: bench with passive income, or permanent deletion.

rt_outcome_bonus.note: Bonus sparks awarded when an RT proposal is accepted and implemented by the user

upgrades.note: Model upgrades are request-based. Agents request via therapist, user approves.

steward.note: Ephemeral subagent spawned by runner on [[request:]] tags. Judge dispatches and routes. Not a roster member.
